title: Welcome to Paragon Systems Forum!
content: Welcome everyone to the official Paragon Systems community forum! Here you can discuss, get support, and stay updated with the latest news about our CS2 enhancement software.
author: Robica

title: Version 1.0.0 Released
content:
We're excited to announce the release of Paragon Systems v1.0.0! This minor update includes:

• Velocity ESP
• New Key binds system
• Better performance optimization
• Customizable UI Color

Download New Loader!
author: Robica

title: Version 1.0.2 Released
content:
---Protection and menu Updates---

• Added Kernel Driver Protection
• Added New Menu

---Enemy ESP Updates---

• Fixed Bomb Timer
• Added Sound ESP
• Added ESP Preview

---Triggerbot Updates---

• Added Stop Check on Triggerbot
• Added Scope Only on Triggerbot
• Added Allow Corner Shoot on Triggerbot
• Added Ignore Flash on Triggerbot

---RCS Feature---

• Added RCS with Yaw and Pitch

---Aimbot Updates---

• Added Start Bullet on Aimbot
• Added Mini Fov on Aimbot
• Added Only Auto on Aimbot

---Misc Updates---

• Added Spectator List
• Added Hit Sound
• Added Hit Markers
• Added Bunny Hop
• Added Fast Stop
• Added Sniper Crosshair
• Added Knfie Bot
• Added Anti-Afk
• Fixed Streamproof

---Configs Added---

• Config List
• Config Name
• Config Author
author: Robica
